# GitlabEventSensor

Polls the GitLab Events API for a project. Triggers a RunRequest for each new event since the cursor. Token-authed (project access token or PAT).

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `asset_keys` | `List[str]` | Slash-separated asset keys to materialize when an event matches. |
| `project_id` | `str` | GitLab project ID or URL-encoded path (e.g. 'my-org%2Fmy-repo'). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `token_env_var` | `str` | `"GITLAB_TOKEN"` | Env var with a GitLab PAT or project token. |
| `base_url` | `str` | `"https://gitlab.com"` | GitLab instance base URL (override for self-hosted). |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Minimum seconds between sensor evaluations. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | 'RUNNING' or 'STOPPED'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `actions` | `List[str]` | `['pushed', 'merged', 'opened', 'closed']` | Event 'action_name' values to filter on. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.GitlabEventSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: gitlab_mr_sensor
  asset_keys: [merge_request_metrics]
  project_id: "12345678"
  token_env_var: GITLAB_TOKEN
  actions: [merged, opened]
  minimum_interval_seconds: 300
```

## Requirements

```
requests
```
